creator: tdb@mirrorservice.org
text:
Here's a diff for http://svn.freebsd.org/doc/head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors/chapter.xml :

Index: chapter.xml
===================================================================
--- chapter.xml (revision 40140)
+++ chapter.xml (working copy)
@@ -3328,7 +3328,7 @@
          <para>Available collections:</para>
          <itemizedlist>
            <listitem>
-             <para>sites/ftp.freebsd.org: A full mirror of the &os;
+             <para>ftp.freebsd.org: A full mirror of the &os;
                FTP server.</para>
            </listitem>
          </itemizedlist>
